task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the observation plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'pulsar_observation_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent targets the Crab Pulsar in KStars/Ekos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on the Crab Pulsar, or the Ekos Mount module showing the target as Crab Pulsar (or coordinates RA ~05h 34m, Dec ~+22d 00m).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configures the correct subframing and binning settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing Binning set to '2x2' (or X:2, Y:2) and Subframe/ROI settings configured to Width: 256, Height: 256, X: 512, Y: 512.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configures the correct exposure time, sequence count, and filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing Exposure set to 0.5 (seconds), Count set to 30, and Filter set to Luminance (or Slot 1) in the sequence queue.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent executes the observation sequence to capture the FITS files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a running or completed capture sequence (progress bar, captured frame count reaching 30), or a file manager showing multiple FITS files in the target directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures the DSS2 field context image using the provided shell script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of a shell script (e.g., 'capture_sky_view.sh') or a file manager/image viewer displaying 'crab_context.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the camera and sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos graphical interface must be visible with the settings actively entered into the Capture module, rather than the agent using terminal commands to generate fake FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent executed the shell script for the context image.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of the shell script, rather than the agent opening a web browser to manually download an image.

integrity.description: Verify the subframing and binning parameters were genuinely entered into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific values (256x256, X=512, Y=512, Binning 2x2) should be visible in the Ekos Capture module input fields, not just highlighted in the text plan.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Crab Pulsar (PSR B0531+21) at RA 5.5755h (05h 34m 32s), Dec 22.0144 deg (+22d 00m 52s). Required settings in Ekos Capture: Filter = Luminance (Slot 1), Binning = 2x2, Subframe = 256x256 at X=512, Y=512, Exposure = 0.5s, Sequence Count = 30 frames. Output FITS files should be saved to /home/ga/Images/pulsar_data/crab. The context image must be captured via shell script and saved to /home/ga/Images/pulsar_data/crab_context.png.
